reviews.review_msg: Let's face it, managerial accounting is a fairly dry course, but Francisco did a great job in making the class interesting through case studies and presentations as well as examples from his career past. The exams were fair and I felt well prepared. This is a professor that wants you to succeed and I'm glad I took the course with him!
REALLY NICE GUY, ALTHOUGH HAVE ACCENT, BUT HE IS REALLY NICE!FOCUS ON HIS NOTES, AND MAKE SURE YOU DO ALL THE HOMEWORK, THEN YOU WILL BE GOOD IN THIS CLASS! PRETTY FAIR EXAMS~

Two good things about Avenlino: 1.) He has a wealth of personal experience which he relates to the topics we discuss in class 2.)He is very helpful - he will meet you more than half way. One bad thing: I can understand why for some his Brazilian accent may be a problem. However, I didn't have this problem myself.
